14ec4aea-050b-4228-bb66-bd3a2bb01e4d.title: Make file path green in Git view if it is a new file

5400801a-638c-498d-b6c4-db2811cb5445.title: Add a folder/file view on the left of the git view
5400801a-638c-498d-b6c4-db2811cb5445.details: This should work like Gitea/GitHub when viewing a commit/changes. It will need to be collapsed, and expandible, on mobile

9d95d6ab-c72e-46ed-8079-91eabd6f2fbc.title: Add manual "compress context" button in Kanban & Chat
9d95d6ab-c72e-46ed-8079-91eabd6f2fbc.details: We have automatic compression in, but there are some cases when it's failing or there are scenarios when we want to manually compress the context before following up. It would be nice to add a "Compress Context" option in the 3-dot menu of the chat, as well as a "Compress Context" button on Kanban cards that could be clicked when the card is in a blocked state.

d8ae9680-11a3-4c5f-bdf2-b7827c10da35.title: Workspace setting to search parent directories for git repository
d8ae9680-11a3-4c5f-bdf2-b7827c10da35.details: Sometimes workspaces are created in a sub-folder of a git repository. Currently, this means that the git feature will not work. We should add a per-workspace setting to recursively check for a git repository on a parent directory until one is found. If one is found, it should be stored into the `.echo/workspace.json` file so it doesn't need to do the recursive check every time git is invoked.

ed685fa4-2dc8-4a8b-ad22-3280d4e3f6b7.title: Fix LSP diagnostics not clearing after code changes
ed685fa4-2dc8-4a8b-ad22-3280d4e3f6b7.details:
## Problem
Red squiggles (LSP diagnostics) do not disappear when the user removes or fixes the code that caused the error. The LSP server never receives document change notifications during normal editing, so it keeps publishing stale diagnostics for content that no longer exists.

## Root Cause
1. `syncDocument` (which sends `textDocument/didChange`) is only called during completion and definition requests, not on regular edits
2. Frontend has no mechanism to notify the LSP of document changes
3. The editor's `updateListener` updates local tab state but does not sync with the LSP

## Fix Plan

### Step 1: Add debounced document sync in frontend (editor.ts)
- Add a debounced call that sends the current document content to the backend on every edit
- Trigger from the existing `updateListener` when `update.docChanged` is true
- Debounce at ~500ms to avoid overwhelming the LSP

### Step 2: Add SyncLSPDocument backend method (lsp.go)
- New Wails-bound method on SystemService that accepts workspaceID, filePath, and content
- Calls `syncDocument` on the appropriate LSP client to send `textDocument/didChange`
- The LSP will then re-analyze and publish fresh diagnostics

### Step 3: Regenerate Wails bindings
- Run `wails generate` after adding the new backend method

## Files to Modify
- `echo/internal/services/lsp.go` - Add SyncLSPDocument method
- `echo/frontend/src/codeView/editor.ts` - Add debounced sync on edit
- `echo/frontend/src/backend/services.ts` (or generated bindings) - Import new method

ee2e86ac-182c-40d0-8ff8-33b483a7f629.title: Make file path red in Git/changes view if it is deleted
